channel.title: PWA on Cyber Security & Linux | Murat Kurkoglu - orioninsist
channel.description: Recent content in PWA on Cyber Security & Linux | Murat Kurkoglu - orioninsist

item.title: Supercharge Your Sway Workflow: Instant AI Hotkeys
item.author: muratkurkoglu@gmail.com (Murat Kurkoglu)
item.description: Learn how to create instant keyboard shortcuts in the Sway Wayland compositor for AI tools like ChatGPT and Gemini, maximizing productivity on Arch Linux.
